sections.title: Punishment for Murder
sections.summary: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death, or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine.
sections.example: If a person intentionally causes the death of another, they can be charged and sentenced under this section.

sections.title: Cheating and Dishonestly inducing delivery of property
sections.summary: Punishes individuals who cheat others to dishonestly obtain property or money.
sections.example: Creating a fake investment scheme to take money from people is a classic example of Section 420.

sections.title: Punishment for Sexual Offence
sections.summary: Prescribes severe punishment, including rigorous imprisonment, for the offence of rape.
sections.example: Non-consensual physical acts are strictly prosecuted under this section to protect the dignity and safety of individuals.

sections.title: Defamation
sections.summary: Whoever, by words spoken or intended to be read, makes or publishes any imputation concerning any person intending to harm their reputation.
sections.example: Writing a false and malicious article about someone to ruin their public image can lead to a defamation suit.
